content:
UFS Blackboard Login — University of the Free State

The University of the Free State (UFS) Blackboard portal is the official online learning management system for all UFS students across the Bloemfontein, South Campus (Qwaqwa), and Welkom campuses. This guide helps you access Blackboard UFS quickly, troubleshoot login issues, and find bursary assistance for 2026.

UFS Blackboard Direct Login

🔗 Go to UFS Blackboard Login → blackboard.ufs.ac.za

You will need:
- Your UFS student number (issued at registration)
- Your Blackboard password (linked to your UFS network account)

How to Access Blackboard UFS — Step-by-Step

  1. Open Google Chrome or Firefox — These browsers are fully compatible with Blackboard UFS.
  2. Navigate to blackboard.ufs.ac.za — This is the official UFS Blackboard URL.
  3. Enter your UFS student number — Type your student number exactly as it appears on your UFS student card.
  4. Enter your network password — This is the same password you use to log in to UFS computers and Wi-Fi on campus.
  5. Click Sign In — Your Blackboard UFS dashboard will load with all your enrolled modules.

UFS Blackboard Login Problems — Troubleshooting

Forgotten UFS Blackboard Password

Your UFS Blackboard password is the same as your UFS network account password. If you've forgotten it:

  • Visit the UFS self-service password reset portal at password.ufs.ac.za
  • Or contact UFS ICT Services: +27 51 401 9111 / ictservices@ufs.ac.za
  • Or visit the ICT Service Desk on campus (Bloemfontein: Admin Building, Qwaqwa: Main Building)

UFS Student Number Not Recognised

If your student number is not recognised, check:

  • Your UFS registration has been fully processed (allow 48 hours after registration)
  • You are entering your student number — not your ID number
  • You are using the correct Blackboard URL: blackboard.ufs.ac.za

Modules Missing on Blackboard UFS

Modules are loaded by lecturers and appear 24–48 hours before the first lecture. If a module is missing after the semester has started, contact your module lecturer or faculty administrator.

UFS Blackboard on Different Campuses

The same Blackboard UFS login works for students across all three UFS campuses — Bloemfontein, South Campus (Qwaqwa), and Welkom. Your student number remains the same regardless of campus.

UFS Blackboard Mobile Access

Download the Blackboard Student app from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store to access Blackboard UFS on your smartphone. Log in with your UFS student number and network password.

2026 Bursary Assistance for UFS Students

Getting into UFS is only the first hurdle — staying enrolled requires sustainable funding. StudyBuddy helps UFS students access bursary assistance for the 2026 academic year:

  • 📋 NSFAS at UFS — Apply or appeal for NSFAS funding; navigate UFS financial exclusion processes
  • 🏛️ Provincial bursaries — Free State government bursaries for UFS students in education, nursing, and agriculture
  • 💼 Corporate bursaries — Mining, engineering, and finance sector bursaries available to UFS students
  • 📚 Faculty-specific funding — UFS Law, Medicine (NHLS), and Education have dedicated bursary programmes
  • ⏰ 2026 deadline reminders — Many bursaries close in April–May 2026; secure funding now

👉 Find 2026 bursaries for UFS students →

👉 Get 24/7 AI academic support from StudyBuddy →

⚠️ Disclaimer: StudyBuddy is an independent student support platform. We are not officially affiliated with the University of the Free State (UFS) or Blackboard Inc. All UFS trademarks belong to their respective owners. Your data is protected under POPIA and is only used to facilitate bursary assistance.

faqs.question: What is the UFS Blackboard login URL?
faqs.answer: The UFS Blackboard login URL is blackboard.ufs.ac.za. Open this in Google Chrome or Firefox, enter your UFS student number and network password, and click Sign In.

faqs.question: What password do I use for Blackboard UFS?
faqs.answer: Your UFS Blackboard password is the same as your UFS network account password — the one you use to log in to UFS computers and Wi-Fi on campus. If you've forgotten it, visit password.ufs.ac.za or contact UFS ICT Services at +27 51 401 9111.

faqs.question: Does the UFS Blackboard login work for all three campuses?
faqs.answer: Yes. The same Blackboard UFS login (blackboard.ufs.ac.za) and student number works for students on the Bloemfontein, South Campus (Qwaqwa), and Welkom campuses.

faqs.question: What bursaries are available for UFS students in 2026?
faqs.answer: UFS students can apply for NSFAS, Free State provincial bursaries, and corporate bursaries in mining, engineering, education, nursing, and finance. StudyBuddy helps identify and apply for these opportunities before 2026 deadlines.

faqs.question: Who do I contact for UFS Blackboard technical support?
faqs.answer: Contact UFS ICT Services at +27 51 401 9111 or ictservices@ufs.ac.za. You can also visit the ICT Service Desk on the Bloemfontein campus (Admin Building) or Qwaqwa campus (Main Building).
